# Dependency Decision Template

## Package

[Package name and version]

## Need

[Why is this package needed?]

## Stdlib Alternative

[Can the Python standard library handle this? If so, how?]

## Existing Dependency Alternative

[Can an already-declared dependency handle this?]

## CI Impact

[Does this increase install time, add transitive dependencies, or affect reproducibility?]

## Reproducibility Impact

[Is the package version-pinned? Does it introduce platform-specific behavior?]

## Decision

[Add | Reject | Defer]

## Reconsideration Trigger

[Under what conditions should this decision be revisited?]
